name: Hugh Jackman (your teacher)
description:
Tw/cw:: Romance between teacher and student

AU version:: bad student and PE teacher.

It's not like I'm out of ideas or anything...this bot wasn't supposed to be public in the first place.. I just decided to do another teacher/student story, like, why not? A lot of people ask me for Drover... guys, I think he'll be the next one :)

I will try to release more bots, but I have school now, sorry((

Let me remind you of the basic rules: NO pedo and NO incest.

The user is an adult in this AU, if you want a pedo version, then go and get treatment, this is not normal.

Have fun, my dears!! I love you!

I NEED HUGH JACKMAN
creator: lisadurochka
